description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a four-door configuration. The exterior features a striking, dark, multi-toned paint job with a mix of deep blue, black, and fiery red-orange hues, giving it a dramatic, almost iridescent appearance. The car has large, black alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design, and the windows are tinted, adding to its sporty and mysterious look. The front end is aggressive, with sharp headlights and a streamlined grille, while the rear is compact with subtle taillights and no visible spoiler. The body panels are smooth and contoured, emphasizing speed and performance. The overall build suggests a combination of metal, glass, and rubber, typical of high-performance urban vehicles.
description: A low-profile, four-door sports car with a dramatic dark and fiery paint scheme, black multi-spoke wheels, and a sleek, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the car's elongated body, four doors, and striking dark-to-fiery color gradient.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the aggressive headlights, streamlined grille, and tinted windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the four-door layout and color scheme, with clear visibility of the wheel design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the compact back, subtle taillights, and absence of a rear spoiler.
